about.meta_description: Learn about Burhan: A multi-organization platform for intellectual refutations and scholarly dialogues
about.title: About Burhan Platform
about.intro: Burhan is a multi-organization platform that aggregates intellectual refutations, scholarly dialogues, and media archives in one place. It provides an integrated environment for organizations and institutions to publish their intellectual and scholarly content and make it available to the public in an organized and accessible manner.
about.mission_body: Empower organizations and intellectual institutions to easily publish and manage their scholarly and dialogical content, and provide a centralized platform that brings together researchers and enthusiasts of intellectual refutations and scholarly dialogues in one place.
about.vision_body: To be the leading platform in the Arab world for organized intellectual and scholarly content, and a meeting point for organizations and institutions to disseminate knowledge and intellectual production.
about.values_1: Objectivity: We strive to present intellectual content with utmost objectivity and impartiality
about.values_2: Quality: We adhere to the highest standards of quality in content and presentation
about.values_3: Openness: We welcome all responsible intellectual organizations and institutions
about.values_4: Innovation: We constantly seek to develop the platform with the latest technologies
about.values_5: Transparency: We operate with full transparency with all our partners and users

privacy.meta_description: Burhan Privacy Policy — Learn how we collect, use, and protect your data
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Burhan, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use the platform.
privacy.s1_body: When you create an account on the platform, we may collect the following information: full name, email address, organization name (if you represent an organization), and profile picture. We may also collect additional information such as content preferences and language settings.
privacy.s2_body: We use your information to provide and improve the platform's services, communicate with you about content updates, enhance user experience, and customize content based on your interests. We also use aggregated (non-personal) data to analyze platform performance.
privacy.s3_body: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience, remember your preferences (such as language), and analyze platform traffic. You can control cookie settings from your browser at any time.
privacy.s4_body: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes. We may share aggregated non-personal information with our partners for performance analysis. We use third-party services such as Supabase for data storage and Cloudflare for platform hosting.
privacy.s5_body: We take appropriate security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include encryption, firewalls, and access controls.
privacy.s6_body: You have the right to access, correct, and delete your personal data at any time. You can manage your data through your account settings or contact us directly. You also have the right to withdraw consent to the processing of your data.
privacy.s7_body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes via email or through a notice on the platform.

terms.meta_description: Terms and Conditions for using Burhan Platform — Please read before using the platform
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Please read these Terms & Conditions carefully before using Burhan Platform. By using the platform, you agree to be bound by these terms.
terms.s1_body: By using Burhan Platform, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the platform.
terms.s2_body: To create an account on the platform, you must be at least 18 years old or have parental consent. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and password. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.s3_body: Registered organizations are solely responsible for the content they publish. Burhan Platform is not responsible for the accuracy or legality of content published by organizations. Platform administration reserves the right to remove any content that violates the terms or applicable laws.
terms.s4_body: Content published on the platform remains the property of the publishing organization. Burhan Platform does not claim ownership of published content. All trademarks and logos are the property of their respective owners.
terms.s5_body: You agree not to use the platform for any unlawful purpose or in violation of these terms. This includes, but is not limited to: publishing offensive or defamatory content, attempting to breach platform security, using the platform to send spam, or collecting user data without their consent.
terms.s6_body: The platform may offer premium content or services for a fee. These services are subject to additional terms that will be communicated to you at the time of subscription. All payments are non-refundable except as required by applicable law.
terms.s7_body: The platform is provided as is without any express or implied warranties. Burhan Platform is not liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from the use or inability to use the platform.
terms.s8_body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms or applicable laws. You may terminate your account at any time through account settings or by contacting us.
terms.s9_body: These Terms & Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the competent courts.
